ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "site_code" INTEGER /* Site code for the school */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "physical_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "physical_city" TEXT /* Physical city of the school */,
  "physical_zip" TEXT /* Physical zip code of the school */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "parish_code" INTEGER /* Parish code for the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email address of the school principal */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_systems" (
  "water_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water system */,
  "pwsid" TEXT /* PWSID of the water system */,
  "pws_name" TEXT /* Name of the water system */,
  "water_system_type" TEXT /* Type of the water system (e.g., municipal, well water) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_water_systems" (
  "school_water_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school-water system association */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "water_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water system */,
  "connection_date" TEXT /* Date the school connected to the water system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_water_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_water_systems_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_water_systems_water_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("water_system_id") REFERENCES water_systems ("water_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_levels" (
  "lead_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead level measurement */,
  "school_water_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school-water system association */,
  "lead_level" REAL /* Lead level in the water system */,
  "action_level_exceedance" TEXT /* Indicates if the action level was exceeded */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was taken */,
  "sample_location" TEXT /* Location of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_levels_school_water_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_water_system_id") REFERENCES school_water_systems ("school_water_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "copper_levels" (
  "copper_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each copper level measurement */,
  "school_water_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school-water system association */,
  "copper_level" REAL /* Copper level in the water system */,
  "action_level_exceedance" TEXT /* Indicates if the action level was exceeded */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was taken */,
  "sample_location" TEXT /* Location of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("copper_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_copper_levels_school_water_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_water_system_id") REFERENCES school_water_systems ("school_water_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "lead_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead level measurement */,
  "copper_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the copper level measurement */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "responsible_party" TEXT /* Party responsible for taking the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_copper_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("copper_level_id") REFERENCES copper_levels ("copper_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_lead_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_level_id") REFERENCES lead_levels ("lead_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_up_actions" (
  "follow_up_action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up action */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initial action */,
  "follow_up_action" TEXT /* Description of the follow-up action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up action */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date the follow-up action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_actions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, school official, water quality specialist) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view data, edit data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_recipients" (
  "report_recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report recipient */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "recipient_email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "water_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water system */,
  "lead_level" REAL /* Lead level in the water system */,
  "copper_level" REAL /* Copper level in the water system */,
  "action_level_exceedance" TEXT /* Indicates if the action level was exceeded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_water_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("water_system_id") REFERENCES water_systems ("water_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message included in the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_recipients" (
  "notification_recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification recipient */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "recipient_email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_recipients_notification_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_id") REFERENCES notifications ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., ppm, mg/L) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_categories" (
  "parameter_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter category */,
  "parameter_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter category */,
  "parameter_category_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_parameter_categories" (
  "parameter_parameter_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter-category association */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "parameter_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_parameter_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_parameter_categories_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_parameter_categories_parameter_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_category_id") REFERENCES parameter_categories ("parameter_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_events" (
  "sampling_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling event */,
  "school_water_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school-water system association */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was taken */,
  "sampling_location" TEXT /* Location of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sampling_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_events_school_water_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_water_system_id") REFERENCES school_water_systems ("school_water_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_results" (
  "sample_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample result */,
  "sampling_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling event */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter (lead or copper) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result (e.g., ppm, mg/L) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_results_sampling_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("sampling_event_id") REFERENCES sampling_events ("sampling_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_results_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)
